rows.label: qev025903_MSG0001
rows.name:
You again... You plan to
interfere with the deeds of
the God of Miracles... You...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0002
rows.name:
Aaah, avatar of God! Grant me your new
words... Bestow a new miracle upon me...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0003
rows.name: ...Very well...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0004
rows.name:
...I see... So you are the demon
blaspheming against our God...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_JNK0010
rows.name: Surprise

rows.label: qev025903_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask who this other Fraisie is.

rows.label: qev025903_JNK0020
rows.name: Calm

rows.label: qev025903_SEL0021
rows.name:
Demand the avatar of God
reveal its true identity.

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0005
rows.name:
Revere and respect me! The miracle
that has appeared in this world, using
my form as a temporary vessel...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0006
rows.name:
This being right here is the avatar
of the God of Miracles that I have
been worshiping all this time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0007
rows.name:
Fraisie and I are the same existence,
yet a different existence entirely...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0008
rows.name:
I am truly blessed... Yes, this being right
here is the avatar of the God of Miracles
that I have been worshiping all this time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0009
rows.name:
Fraisie... Using the blood of the Ma-non
you killed as a medium, let us summon the
messengers of miracles from the heavens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0010
rows.name:
I-Is that true?! I feel like I'm
going to cry from sheer joy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0011
rows.name:
Hehe, this is only the beginning of the miracles...
Eventually, with your power and mine, shall we
bring about an even more gruesome miracle?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0012
rows.name:
Now then, appear...
messengers of miracles![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0013
rows.name:
Ooh! What a majestic appearance! These
are truly the children of God...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_JNK0030
rows.name: Point Out

rows.label: qev025903_SEL0031
rows.name:
Point out to Fraisie that they
are clearly Growth Pawn Verdes.

rows.label: qev025903_JNK0040
rows.name: Prepare for Battle

rows.label: qev025903_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ignore the entranced Fraisie
and take a fighting stance.

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0014
rows.name:
They say that to a heretic, even God appears as a
demon! In other words, the fact that they look that
way to you is proof that they are the children of God![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0015
rows.name:
Yes... That is fine... You
are mine for all eternity...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0016
rows.name:
To strike at the gods... Aaah... Why
must such beings exist in this world?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0017
rows.name:
It is fine, Fraisie. As long
as you understand me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0018
rows.name:
Hehe, eventually the world
will be forced to accept the
God of Miracles, after all...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Now, messengers of miracles...
Eradicate these filthy ones![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0020
rows.name:
Aah... God of Miracles...
Burn away these fools...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0021
rows.name:
...The avatar of God... is
dead...? That cannot be...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025903_MSG0022
rows.name:
I will never... believe a single
word from you demons...![ST:wait ]
